vllm.title: Updating lm-format-enforcer version and adding links to decoding libraries in docs
vllm.author: noamgat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Updated lm-format-enforcer version from 0.9.3 to 0.9.8. These versions have no API changes, solve a few bugs and improve JSONSchemaParser performance by 2x in many cases.
Added links to the libraries in the guided-decoding-backend docstring, so the vLLM OpenAI Compatible Server docs page now looks l
